programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBH 133
programme.desc: TBH 133

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Mrs Gladys Stroud a renowned hotel critic decides to come and review the Shady Rest after she is accidentally sent a brochure uncle Joe made This was the vision of what he hoped the hotel would one day be including indoor ice rink bowling alley and swimming pool Now the family has to scramble to keep her from finding out the truth and closing them down for lying

programme.title: Munsters 109
programme.desc: Munsters 109

programme.title: Addams Family 115
programme.desc: Addams Family 115

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Has-been comic Barry Keys asks Julie to let him entertain on board to return a favor Mrs Warner is determined to marry off her granddaughter Shirley College pals bet on whether virginal Dan changes his status before the cruise ends

programme.title: Daktari 225
programme.desc: Daktari 225

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A young woman Kathleen Lloyd working at Hart Industries becomes obsessed with her boss Jonathan and mimics Jennifers appearance to replace her

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: hen a Jane Doe homeless lady is murdered Chris vows to find out who she is Meanwhile Chris and Mary Beth shoot a recruiting commercial for the NYPD while Mary Beth is fighting a nasty cold

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: While working a case Starsky learns that Hutchs new girlfriend Gillian is a high class prostitute working for some criminals theyre investigating

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle

programme.title: Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction

programme.title: Addams Family 102
programme.desc: Addams Family 102

programme.title: Addams 205
programme.desc: Addams 205

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa pretends to be able to read so he can vote against an uppity female politician

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets struck with jealousy because of Flora MacMichael and tries to take it out on her apple tree

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: In a run down hotel in a town where a slasher has killed 7 people Eric checks in after inquiring about Skorzeny He meets several people staying at the hotel including a man in black who reveals that he is also werewolf born in 1468

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric teams up with an elderly homeless man who is also a werewolf in an effort to defeat Remy But discovers that the Gray Wolf hungers for human flesh

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick comes face to face with the vampire LaCroix and kills him But the serial murders continue and get personal when it is discovered that one of the victims was a friend of Nicks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack travel to a small town where the disappearance of several children is linked to a mysterious toy playhouse

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: When a lecherous psychiatrist hypnotizes a female patient and seduces her hes caught by a colleague so he resorts to drastic measures to cover up his crime Meanwhile a man who has accidentally murdered is coerced by his girlfriend into undergoing plastic surgery to change his appearance -- but they unknowingly choose the face of a mobster who recently turned states evidence and is being pursued by a hit man

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Janet is married to a doctor whos married to his work She wants to live her life with passion danger and romance like Fuchsia Monroe a soap opera character she watches religiously When her television goes haywire her friend Louise convinces her to get cable With her husband unresponsive to her needs she begins a steamy affair with the cable guy

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Two con artist attempt to steal the fortune of a rich man they accidentally killed by creating a fake seance for his blind wife but not everything goes to plan

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Trans Cal Truckings new strongman Cooley conspire to put Bear Enterprises out of business aided and abetted by a stranger with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The new kid on the block is having trouble fitting in so Mister Ed comes up with a plan to help him win friends

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: When Wilbur balks at buying a new car for Carol she hitches up a buggy to Mister Ed Ed then reports her to the SPCA

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While trying to free the underground agent Tiger in Paris Hogan must seek help from a Parisian fortune teller and also enlist the aid of a man who is a look-alike for Nazi Police Chief Heinrich Himmler!

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: With camp security raised Hogan and his men are desperate to smuggle some top-secret plans of German fortifications to the Allies The solution Make liberal use of Carters remarkable impersonation of Adolf Hitler

programme.title: Mchale 334
programme.desc: Mchale 334

programme.title: Mchale 317
programme.desc: Mchale 317

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke talks Gomer into taking a jeep to the airport

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find parts of an ancient Hieroglyphic stone tablet that may tell them the way to get off the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa trades a date with Flora for a hound dog

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Amos invites their old neighbors to California for a visit including Lukes old girlfriend Elvira Kate tries to hide her jealousy during the reminiscing of old times

programme.title: Away All Boats
programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Publisher Alfred Newberrys wife Sandra falls for author Mark Littlejohn of a long-awaited book Merrills lecherous uncle Cy Foster chases Julie Businessman Martin Scotts daughter Allison uses female charm to close a merger for him

programme.title: WKRP 214
programme.desc: WKRP 214

programme.title: WKRP 217
programme.desc: WKRP 217

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: The annual sports banquet is interrupted when Ava goes into labor and is rushed to the hospital

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood Harlow and Hermon Attempt to make it back to Evening Shade without any clothes on

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Vega

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Maurice a famous French chef and chemist has created something world-changing and wants to distribute it through Jonathans company but before he can tell Jonathan about it he is killed and his recipes stolen

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: When his boss goes out of town Michael volunteers Stephanie to run her girl scout troupe but the girls arent interested in Stephanies shallow and materialistic ways and Stephanie is horrified to learn shes expected to go camping with them

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick goes to a dude ranch for his vacation

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After an eletrical explosion in his lab apparently kills Arcane our arch fiend finds himself on trial in a nightmarish comedy of his crimes against his victims

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: How will Swamp Thing deal with a man who has captured footage of him on film and the deadly creatures released into the swamp

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Maintenance technician Ted Clifford is possessed by an eerie yellow glow which ultimately kills him It transpires that it is coming from a planet called Triton which captures the Alphans and insists that Helena should become the Eyes of Triton Before long she is acting just as Ted Clifford did before his death

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: When USA detects a gigantic meteor moving towards Earth their only hope to save mankind is to use an illegal nuclear weapon satellite However they soon realize that they cannot do it alone

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Hercules 222
programme.desc: Hercules 222

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An Irish guide finds the possible burial location of Mael a Taelon that came to Earth 2000 years ago It is crucial for the Taelons to find his research material

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An enemy agents kidnapped 2 scientists and their wives and is holding them in San Francisco He wants a third scientist who can help develop an ultimate weapon Phelps devises a plan where hell pose as the scientist being sought whilst the rest of the IM force fakes an earthquake

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Gannon and Friday visit a self-described guru who advocates mind-expansion through drugs Brother William is suspected of giving or selling LSD to minors The detectives debate their ideas of drug use with the suspect

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are asked by a woman from Oregon to try to find her niece who has run away from home Their search eventually leads them into the world of pornography and they soon become involved in the arrest of a pornographer who may have info on where she might be located

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The Fugitive

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An Englishman with a large gambling debt agrees to smuggle whiskey onto an Indian reservation to pay off his losses Enroute he meets up with Victoria on the way to the reservation with medical supplies and they find the road there is full of unexpected surprises

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into Paradise Springs the town of friendly people When hes greeted with fists instead and has to stand trial he finds the judges wife knows more than shes telling but he remembers her too but doesnt know why

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: In order to stop a psychotic priest killer Lt Stone goes undercover as a Roman Catholic priest The victims were all clergymen who studied at the same seminary

programme.title: Silent Rage
programme.desc: When Sheriff Dan kills a man with a mental illness a team of doctors resuscitates him and makes him invincible Terror fills the town as the revived man sets off on a killing spree

programme.title: Revenge of the Dragon
programme.desc: Action star Ramon Zamora stars in this action packed golden oldie A cruel twist of fate turns a peaceful man into a one man death force as he embarks on a violent vengeance trial

programme.title: The Bronx Warriors
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic New York City a policeman infiltrates the Bronx which has become a battleground for several murderous street gangs

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A group of terrorists seize the Thunderblast top-secret super tank hiding it in Mexico The task of recovering it is entrusted to Frank McBain a former secret agent and current cop

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Antonin Marconi v. Rachid Magmadi

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.desc: ¿Qué son las finanzas ¿qué son y para qué sirven los impuestos De la mano de Dario Celis conoce la información en economía finanzas y negocios El noticiario con las tendencias en materia de dinero e inversión

programme.title: NOTICIAS DE LA TARDE
programme.desc: Noticias Telemundo es un proveedor líder de noticias para los latinos en EEUU

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: The N team gets warp into the world of Faxanadu after a power overload in the Palace of Powers football arena There they get mixed in the conflict between elves and dwarves and also an evil being bent on getting a powerful crystal that will let him conquer the video world

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While Link and Zelda are at Lanas royal ball the furious Mother Brain fires Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo for failing to capture the Triforce So Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo steal the Triforce pieces for themselves

programme.title: Dugeons Dragons
programme.desc: A terrifying creature called The Darkling has been kidnapping people for a thousand years A few more victims will give him the power to take over the entire Realm The team must stop The Darkling but he is too much for them

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is on holiday at the Winter Olympics where Dr Claw plans to sabotage the games by replacing the torch bearer Gadget also faces the MAD yodeler and a Yeti-like Snowbot

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The GoBots are forced into a grudging alliance to defeat a race of enormous metal-eating spiders

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Warlike insects invade the Earth thanks to Cy-Kills space rift but his plan backfires when the bugs prove too difficult to eradicate even for the Renegades

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: With a few clues and a little conjuring Gillian produces a map showing the destination of the original Lightning League that disappeared years ago In a far off place untouched by Saw Boss Jayce is disgusted to find them playing war games

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The powerful liberty stone protects Aloar from all invaders by creating the spidereen whirlpool Gillian brings the league to this planet to see his old magician friend Axilar and to use the stone to seek Audrics whereabouts

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the famous Lippizaner Stallions earning 4 million in platinum bars from an Arab At the end VENOM loses the money by a laser shot from Shark and they all quickly flee in Piranha

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is manipulating a tribe of aboriginals with holographic projections of flying rocks The aboriginals think its their god Mimi VENOM is after the secret treasure chamber of Mimi Scott and T-Bob get mixed up with the aboriginals when they think T-Bob is representing their Mimi god At the end Brad saves the day with his hocus pocus mask
